channel.title: GitHub Pages on T++
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub Pages on T++

item.title: Deploying Hugo to GitHub Pages with GitHub Actions
item.description: There are a lot of strategies to hosting in-repo docs on GitHub Pages (as opposed to a dedicated repo for docs). I’m going to cover how to publish docs that are stored on the master branch to the gh-pages branch. This approach has several benefits Only the Hugo “source” files live in master, while gh-pages contains the built HTML, etc. This keeps master clean and lean, and makes PR diffs much easier to review.
